name: faberlang-agent-skills
description: Focused agent guides for the Faber programming language: install, language shape, packages, real-world examples, and corpus lookup.

skills.name: install
skills.description: Download and verify the current Faber CLI release for macOS arm64 or Linux x64.

skills.name: language
skills.description: Write and review Faber source: type-first declarations, Latin keywords, glyphs, nullability, comments, and HIR-as-truth.

skills.name: packages
skills.description: Scaffold and drive Faber packages with faber check/build/run/test/format and faber.toml layout.

skills.name: examples
skills.description: Open real application packages in faberlang/examples (AI Workbench, ViviLite, coreutils, GPU, corpus).

skills.name: corpus
skills.description: Look up language constructs via generated corpus pages and the examples/corpus source tree.
